author_identification.canonical_name_ar: محمد بن عبد الله بن محمد بن أحمد بن العربي المعافري الإشبيلي
author_identification.scholarly_standing: Hadith scholar and transmitter from Al-Andalus, known for his travels to the East and narration of hadith

scholarly_context.tradition_position: A collection of five hadiths transmitted by Ibn al-Arabi al-Mutawakkil, part of the broader hadith transmission tradition
scholarly_context.historical_significance: Part of the Mahmudiyah collections preserved in the King Abdulaziz Library in Madinah, with valuable transmission chains and hearings
scholarly_context.muhaqiq_reputation: نبيل سعد الدين جرَّار is a known editor of Islamic texts, though specific reputation details are not provided
